mapper.sql: s.id, s.emp_id as empId, e.name as empName, e.dept_id as deptId, d.name as deptName, s.work_date as workDate, s.start_time as startTime, s.end_time as endTime, s.schedule_type as scheduleType, s.max_appointments as maxAppointments, s.remark, s.create_time as createTime, s.update_time as updateTime
mapper.select:
select
from emp_schedule s left join emp e on s.emp_id = e.id left join dept d on e.dept_id = d.id where s.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into emp_schedule (emp_id, work_date, start_time, end_time, schedule_type, max_appointments, remark) values (#{empId}, #{workDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{scheduleType}, #{maxAppointments}, #{remark})
mapper.update: update emp_schedule set emp_id = #{empId}, work_date = #{workDate}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, schedule_type = #{scheduleType}, max_appointments = #{maxAppointments}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
